item.title: INFRA: First-Run Experience
item.intent: First launch must be instant and self-evident — open the app and you're writing within 30 seconds, with AI model downloading silently in the background.
item.description: Per D-UX-1 (no onboarding) and D-AI-9 (model download). First launch flow: app opens to home screen (Open/New buttons). No splash screen beyond system launch image. On capable devices (A16+/M1+): after 2 seconds, a non-modal banner offers AI model download ('Download AI assistant? ~3GB, Wi-Fi recommended'). User can accept (download starts in background), dismiss (asked again next launch), or go to settings. User can open/create a file immediately regardless of model download state. AI features hidden until model ready.
acceptanceCriteria: First launch to editor-ready state (file open and cursor active) in <30 seconds including user interaction
No onboarding screens, tutorials, or account prompts appear
AI model download prompt appears non-modally and is dismissable
User can edit a file while model downloads in background
On unsupported devices (pre-A16), no AI download prompt appears
